reviews.review_description: I'm trying to play with my friends but I can only join one of them. We've been trying to figure this out for like half an hour now. We're genuinely confused.
Goon. Its tuff.
good
Good game
It's a scary game but it's hard to Actually join friends in a private lobby
Fun
Good game
Good game

Pros:
> Fairly interesting idea
> Pretty good mood lighting
> Phone/camera worked well

Cons
> Audio seemed inconsistent (clearly able to tell where audio clips start and stop, then sometimes it feels like there should be more but the audio has already stopped while you see ghosts snarling at you)
> Interface is almost non-existent, no indication of what you should do to start the game from the lobby (0 / 3 what..?), no instructions on controls
> Lack of overall polish

This seems like a prototype/proof of concept more than a finished product, that has only been play-tested by the developers. As such, it feels like the developers played it knowing already how to play it and just assumed everybody else would instinctively know what to do and the controls. But, through the lens of a prototype, you could say that what they have so far is fairly decent, if only they would playtest outside their studio, give it some polish and fix up some of the audio/ambience. Has potential if it were to be finished.

Also, I wanted to give this feedback without reviewing so there was the chance to act on my feedback, but the link to the discord on the company website is for a specific game, not the general studio, so there was no other way to deliver this feedback.

it’s nothing to do and they are no people who play it now and if you try to refund it’s not gonna let you 

please give me a refund because this game is not what i was looking at on the videos

I have a friend I play with, but have only been able to make a private room work one time. We get errors ("unable to join room") after entering the room code. It's frustrating. 

The actual game is fun, though.

Not bad and not great either. Pretty cool concept but opening doors is annoying. Some of the ghosts are kinda silly and I'm OK with that. Creepy at times but doesn't take scares too seriously. In a group of friends, the game is most enjoyable, however... Its up to 3 (not 4) players only. If the devs keep supporting this, I believe this game could have a lot more potential. Thanks for experience!

Dont waste your money. Seriously. This is clunky and underwhelming.
I had buyers remorse within 10 minutes.
1 character model for all 4 players. You hold your phone like its the ace of spades.
"Scary" ghosts include: guy doing situps, man standing in kitchen, pregnant lady who is too wide to walk past, the most aggrevating incessant dinging sound the never ends, your cellphone has 1 function: take photo that doesnt save anywhere.
I bought a copy for me and my friend, 40$ spent on a demo.
THIS DIDNT EVEN WORK SCAMMED OUT OF 45 DOLLARS WHEN I GIFTED IT TO MY FRIENDS
